languages.text: Кажется, что внутри льда некрон! И он выглядит мертвым, хотя визуально не повреждён.

traits.locale_text: Кажется, что внутри льда некрон! И он выглядит мертвым, хотя визуально не повреждён.

languages.text: Заточенный в ледяной глыбе ксенос выглядит невредимым. Его металлические конечности крепко сжаты на причудливого вида оружии, а по корпусу пробегают зеленоватые вспышки. В щелях, заменяющих твари глаза, мерцает еле уловимый зловещий свет.

Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.
languages.original_text: Заточенный в ледяной глыбе ксенос выглядит невредимым. Его металлические конечности крепко сжаты на причудливого вида оружии, а по корпусу пробегают зеленоватые вспышки. В щелях, заменяющих твари глаза, мерцает еле уловимый зловещий свет.

traits.locale_text: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

languages.text: Der in einen Eisblock eingeschlossene Xenos scheint unversehrt zu sein. Seine metallenen Hände halten eine absonderliche Waffe, während schwache grüne Blitze auf seinem Körper zucken. Ein düsteres, unheilvolles Licht flackert in seinen schmalen Augenschlitzen.
languages.original_text: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

traits.locale_text: Der in einen Eisblock eingeschlossene Xenos scheint unversehrt zu sein. Seine metallenen Hände halten eine absonderliche Waffe, während schwache grüne Blitze auf seinem Körper zucken. Ein düsteres, unheilvolles Licht flackert in seinen schmalen Augenschlitzen.

languages.text: Le corps du xénos, enfermé dans son carcan de glace, semble indemne. Ses membres métalliques tiennent une arme étrange et des éclats de lumière verte se reflètent sur tout son corps. Une lumière ténue, mais inquiétante, émane de ses yeux plissés.
languages.original_text: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

traits.locale_text: Le corps du xénos, enfermé dans son carcan de glace, semble indemne. Ses membres métalliques tiennent une arme étrange et des éclats de lumière verte se reflètent sur tout son corps. Une lumière ténue, mais inquiétante, émane de ses yeux plissés.

languages.text: Atrapado en un bloque de hielo, el xenos parece indemne. Sus extremidades de metal se aferran a un arma peculiar y unos leves destellos verdes recorren su cuerpo. Una luz pálida y siniestra parpadea en las estrechas ranuras de sus ojos.
languages.original_text: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

traits.locale_text: Atrapado en un bloque de hielo, el xenos parece indemne. Sus extremidades de metal se aferran a un arma peculiar y unos leves destellos verdes recorren su cuerpo. Una luz pálida y siniestra parpadea en las estrechas ranuras de sus ojos.

languages.text: Buz blokunun içine hapsolmuş zeno, yara almamış gibi görünüyor. Metal uzuvları tuhaf bir silahı kavramış ve bedeninde hafif yeşil parıltılar dalgalanıyor. Gözlerinin dar yarıklarında sönük, uğursuz bir ışık titreşiyor.
languages.original_text: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

traits.locale_text: Buz blokunun içine hapsolmuş zeno, yara almamış gibi görünüyor. Metal uzuvları tuhaf bir silahı kavramış ve bedeninde hafif yeşil parıltılar dalgalanıyor. Gözlerinin dar yarıklarında sönük, uğursuz bir ışık titreşiyor.

languages.text: 被封在冰块中的异形看起来毫发无损。它的金属肢体紧握着一柄古怪的武器，淡淡的绿色闪光在其体表荡开。它狭长的眼缝中，闪烁着幽暗不祥的光芒。
languages.original_text: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

traits.locale_text: 被封在冰块中的异形看起来毫发无损。它的金属肢体紧握着一柄古怪的武器，淡淡的绿色闪光在其体表荡开。它狭长的眼缝中，闪烁着幽暗不祥的光芒。

languages.text: 氷の塊に閉じ込められた異形は、傷一つない。金属製の肢は奇妙な武器を握り、その体には緑色の光がかすかに波打つ。狭く鋭い眼の隙間からは、不吉な光がちらつく。
languages.original_text: Encased in a block of ice, the xenos appears unscathed. Its metal limbs grip a peculiar weapon, and faint green flashes ripple across its body. A dim, ominous light flickers within the narrow slits of its eyes.

traits.locale_text: 氷の塊に閉じ込められた異形は、傷一つない。金属製の肢は奇妙な武器を握り、その体には緑色の光がかすかに波打つ。狭く鋭い眼の隙間からは、不吉な光がちらつく。
